description.value: > Curse Associated Domain: Luck. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the bit of luck power of the Luck domain. The effect lasts for 1 minute or until the target hits you with an attack. You can use this ability for a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
